meaning: n.时尚,一时流行的狂热,一时的爱好
examples: Every single fad diet is total rubbish.
This is much like our fad "starvation diets"—and with similar results.
This may seem like a crazy celebrity fad, but it's not such a bad one.
But those fad diets would never last more than a few weeks, and his weight would rebound.
The cooler fad eventually cooled, but the Sands family kept juggling brands and varieties.
